user.title: RB3Enhanced
user.description: Listens for RB3Enhanced UDP event broadcasts. Make sure `EnableEvents = true` is set in your rb3.ini.

abort.already_configured: A listener on this port is already configured.

menu_options.ha_lights: Smart light engine (Hue and other HA lights)

data.fire_events: Fire rb3e_event on the Home Assistant event bus
data.turn_off_in_menus: Turn lights off when returning to menus

data_description.turn_off_in_menus: Applies to both light engines. For WLED this also releases the strip back to WLED/Hyperion.

ha_lights.title: Smart light engine
ha_lights.description: Drives Home Assistant light entities via service calls. Best for slower lights (Hue, LIFX, etc). For addressable strips running WLED, use the WLED engine instead.

data_description.lights_red: Mixed mode: whole-ring brightness on one light; the same light in multiple channels blends colors.
data_description.zones_red: Positional mode: the ring's 8 LEDs are split across the entities in the order you add them — 8 entities (e.g. WLED segments) = 1 LED each, 4 = 2 each, 2 = 4 each. Works the same for the other colors; a segment listed under several colors blends them.
data_description.min_update_interval_ms: Raise this if your lights lag or drop commands (Hue: 200ms+).

wled.title: WLED engine
wled.description: Streams per-LED frames straight to a WLED device over its UDP realtime protocol (no entities involved). The full Stage Kit state — 4 colors x 8 LED positions — is mapped across the strip. When a song ends, the strip is released so WLED effects or Hyperion take over automatically.

data_description.wled_host: The WLED device's hostname or IP. Make sure 'Receive UDP realtime' is enabled in WLED (Sync settings, on by default).
data_description.wled_led_start: Use count + offset to drive only part of a strip.
data_description.wled_mode: Blend: strip split into 8 position segments, simultaneous colors blend additively. Interleave: each segment splits into red/green/blue/yellow lanes like the physical Stage Kit pod.
data_description.wled_strobe_enabled: Flashes the strip white at the real Stage Kit rates (6-12 Hz).
data_description.wled_timeout_s: Seconds without frames before WLED exits realtime mode and hands the strip back to its own effects or Hyperion.
data_description.wled_min_interval_ms: 20 ms = up to 50 fps. Raise if your network or ESP struggles.
data_description.wled_custom_map: Overrides the mapping mode with explicit per-LED assignments. See the README for the JSON schema and an example.

error.wled_host_required: Enter the WLED host or IP to enable the WLED engine.
error.invalid_custom_map: Custom map must be a valid JSON object.
